timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: OpenAI founded
description: OpenAI was founded as an artificial intelligence research organization.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: OpenAI Gym released
description: The company launched a major reinforcement-learning toolkit for researchers.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: OpenAI Universe announced
description: OpenAI broadened research infrastructure for training AI agents across software environments.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: OpenAI Baselines published
description: The organization released reference implementations for reinforcement learning.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: OpenAI Five gains attention in esports
description: The project demonstrated rapid progress in multi-agent reinforcement learning.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: GPT introduced

title: OpenAI LP created
description: The organization adopted a capped-profit structure to support scaling research.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: GPT-2 released in stages
description: The company drew wide attention with staged release of a large language model.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.

description: A deep strategic partnership with Microsoft began shaping OpenAI's growth.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.

description: A much larger language model pushed OpenAI to the center of AI discussion.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: DALL-E announced
description: OpenAI presented a text-to-image generation system.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: Codex unveiled
description: OpenAI expanded into code generation with the Codex model.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: ChatGPT launched
description: ChatGPT rapidly became one of the fastest-growing consumer applications in history.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: Microsoft expands OpenAI partnership
description: Microsoft deepened its backing of OpenAI during the generative AI boom.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: GPT-4 announced
description: OpenAI introduced a more capable flagship multimodal-capable model.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: Leadership crisis erupts

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: GPT-4o announced

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: OpenAI broadens enterprise and developer products
description: The company deepened commercial expansion around APIs and AI tools.

timeline_description: Major corporate, research, and product milestones in the history of OpenAI.
title: OpenAI remains a central force in generative AI
description: The organization continued shaping consumer, developer, and enterprise AI markets.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.

description: The coup against Mohammad Mossadegh shaped later anti-shah politics.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: White Revolution launched
description: The shah's modernization program intensified opposition from clerics and other critics.

title: Khomeini denounces the shah
description: Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini emerged as a leading critic of the monarchy.

title: Khomeini exiled
description: The shah expelled Khomeini, who continued opposition from abroad.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Opposition activity broadens
description: Intellectuals, clerics, and activists increasingly challenged royal rule.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Qom protests erupt
description: Demonstrations after an anti-Khomeini article helped ignite the revolutionary cycle.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Tabriz protests spread unrest
description: Forty-day mourning protests expanded anti-shah mobilization.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Cinema Rex fire shocks Iran
description: The disaster intensified rage and political instability.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Black Friday crackdown
description: Security forces killed protesters in Tehran in a major turning point.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Strikes deepen regime crisis
description: Oil workers and other sectors joined a wave of strikes that hurt the state.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Muharram demonstrations reach huge scale
description: Mass religious protests showed the monarchy's weakening grip.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Shah leaves Iran
description: Mohammad Reza Shah departed the country amid revolutionary upheaval.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Khomeini returns to Iran
description: The exiled cleric returned triumphantly to Tehran.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Monarchy collapses
description: Revolutionary forces triumphed and the Pahlavi state fell.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Referendum backs Islamic Republic
description: Voters approved replacing the monarchy with an Islamic Republic.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: U.S. embassy seized
description: Militants occupied the American embassy and began the hostage crisis.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Islamic Republic constitution approved
description: The new revolutionary political order was formalized constitutionally.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Bani-Sadr elected president
description: The Islamic Republic held its first presidential election.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Cultural Revolution begins
description: The new regime moved to restructure universities and public life.

timeline_description: Major political and social milestones in the Iranian Revolution of 1978–1979 and its aftermath.
title: Islamic Republic consolidates power
description: Rival revolutionary factions and opposition groups were violently marginalized.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Nuclear magnetic resonance independently discovered
description: Felix Bloch and Edward Purcell separately developed the principles underlying NMR.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Bloch and Purcell win Nobel Prize
description: The Nobel recognized foundational work behind magnetic resonance methods.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.

description: Magnetic resonance techniques spread in scientific research.

title: Damadian reports tissue-relaxation differences
description: Research suggested magnetic resonance could distinguish diseased tissue.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Lauterbur publishes image-formation breakthrough
description: Magnetic resonance was shown capable of producing spatial images.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Early MRI patents and engineering efforts expand
description: Researchers pushed from concept toward practical scanners.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Mansfield advances rapid imaging methods
description: Technical innovations improved the feasibility of clinical imaging.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: First whole-body human MRI scan reported
description: A major step toward clinical MRI was achieved.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Prototype scanners improve image quality
description: Engineering progress made MRI more clinically useful.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Early clinical MRI systems installed
description: Hospitals began experimenting with practical scanners.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: MRI enters broader clinical use
description: The technology expanded into hospital imaging programs.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Commercial MRI market grows
description: Manufacturers increasingly competed in medical imaging hardware.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Functional MRI groundwork advances
description: Research on blood-oxygen-related effects moved toward later fMRI.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: MRI becomes established in neurology and orthopedics
description: The technology was increasingly central to noninvasive diagnosis.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Functional MRI demonstrated
description: fMRI opened a major new era in brain research and imaging.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Lauterbur and Mansfield awarded Nobel Prize
description: The Nobel recognized key contributions to MRI imaging methods.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: Higher-field MRI systems spread
description: More powerful magnets improved imaging detail in research and medicine.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: MRI-guided interventions and advanced sequences expand
description: The modality broadened its range of clinical and research applications.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: MRI remains a cornerstone of modern medical diagnosis
description: The technology continued to play a central role across medicine.

timeline_description: Major scientific, medical, and technological milestones in the history of magnetic resonance imaging.
title: MRI research continues in speed, resolution, and accessibility
description: Innovation remained focused on better imaging and wider clinical access.

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.

description: Political support grew for a pan-European aircraft manufacturer.

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.
title: A300 program advances
description: The consortium pushed ahead with its first airliner project.

title: A300 makes first flight
description: Airbus's first aircraft took to the air.

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.
title: A300 enters service
description: The first Airbus commercial jet entered airline operations.

description: The consortium deepened its multinational structure.

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.
title: A320 program launched

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.
title: A320 first flight
description: The fly-by-wire narrow-body program reached a major milestone.

title: A320 enters service

title: A340 first flight
description: Airbus expanded its long-haul portfolio.

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.
title: A330 enters service

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.
title: A380 enters service

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.

timeline_description: Major industrial, corporate, and product milestones in the rise of Airbus.
title: Airbus remains one of the world's two dominant commercial aircraft manufacturers

timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and architectural milestones in the history of the Khmer Empire.

timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and architectural milestones in the history of the Khmer Empire.

timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and architectural milestones in the history of the Khmer Empire.

description: Khmer artistic achievement flourished in temple construction.

timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and architectural milestones in the history of the Khmer Empire.
title: Suryavarman I consolidates rule
description: A strong ruler expanded imperial authority.

timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and architectural milestones in the history of the Khmer Empire.

description: The empire stood as a major regional force.

timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and architectural milestones in the history of the Khmer Empire.

description: His reign marked one of the great eras of Khmer expansion and building.

timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and architectural milestones in the history of the Khmer Empire.

timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and architectural milestones in the history of the Khmer Empire.
title: Khmer power shifts southward
description: The post-Angkor state reoriented away from the old imperial capital.

timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and architectural milestones in the history of the Khmer Empire.
title: Khmer Empire survives mainly as historical legacy

timeline_description: Major culinary and cultural milestones in the history of sushi.
title: California roll popularizes adapted sushi forms
description: Fusion sushi helped broaden international appeal.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Sushi
timeline_description: Major culinary and cultural milestones in the history of sushi.
title: Global sushi restaurant culture expands
description: Sushi became an increasingly visible world cuisine.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Sushi
timeline_description: Major culinary and cultural milestones in the history of sushi.
title: Supermarket sushi and mass-market formats spread
description: Sushi entered everyday retail in many countries.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Sushi
timeline_description: Major culinary and cultural milestones in the history of sushi.
title: Washoku recognized by UNESCO
description: Japanese food culture gained major international cultural recognition.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Sushi
timeline_description: Major culinary and cultural milestones in the history of sushi.
title: Sustainability and tuna sourcing debates reshape sushi culture
description: Environmental concerns became central to modern sushi consumption.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Sushi
timeline_description: Major culinary and cultural milestones in the history of sushi.
title: Sushi remains a global mainstream cuisine
description: The food had become one of Japan's most influential culinary exports.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Sushi
timeline_description: Major culinary and cultural milestones in the history of sushi.
title: Sushi continues to span traditional craft and global adaptation
description: The cuisine remains both a heritage form and a highly globalized food.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Powered flight begins
description: The start of aviation created the future need for traffic management in the air.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Early airport traffic management emerges
description: Growing air activity required more organized ground and approach control.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: First radio direction and control methods advance
description: Communication technology began shaping safer air operations.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: First airport control tower often credited at Cleveland
description: Dedicated tower-based traffic management took clearer institutional form.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Control towers spread to more airports
description: Air traffic control became increasingly standardized.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: First en route air traffic control centers opened in the United States
description: Route-level control expanded beyond individual airports.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Radar enters wartime control environment
description: War accelerated technological advances that later transformed civil ATC.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Chicago Convention lays framework for civil aviation cooperation
description: International aviation governance and standards were strengthened.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: ICAO begins operations
description: The International Civil Aviation Organization became central to global standards.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Grand Canyon mid-air collision shocks aviation
description: The disaster accelerated modernization of air traffic control.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: FAA created in the United States
description: Federal reorganization deepened national control over airspace safety.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Jet age increases ATC complexity
description: Faster aircraft and growing traffic intensified system demands.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Computerization grows in ATC systems
description: Automation began reshaping traffic management.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: U.S. air traffic controllers strike
description: The PATCO strike became a major event in labor and aviation history.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Secondary radar and transponder use become increasingly central
description: Surveillance and identification improved system control.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Satellite navigation starts reshaping airspace planning
description: ATC moved toward more precise route and approach management.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Next-generation modernization efforts expand
description: Digital networks and new surveillance tools became strategic priorities.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: ADS-B deployment increases
description: Modern surveillance based on satellite navigation spread in civil aviation.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Pandemic temporarily disrupts air traffic volumes
description: ATC systems adapted to one of the biggest shocks in aviation history.

timeline_description: Major technological, institutional, and safety milestones in the history of air traffic control.
title: Air traffic control remains essential to global aviation safety and efficiency
description: Modern ATC continues integrating automation, satellite navigation, and dense traffic management.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Battle of Manzikert weakens Byzantine control in Anatolia
description: Byzantium's defeat to the Seljuks helped set the background for appeals to the West.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Council of Piacenza hears Byzantine appeal
description: Emperor Alexius I sought western military assistance against the Turks.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Urban II calls for crusade at Clermont
description: The pope urged western Christians to aid the East and recover Jerusalem.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: People's Crusade sets out
description: Popular, poorly organized crusading movements began before the main armies.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: People's Crusade destroyed in Anatolia
description: Early crusader groups suffered catastrophic defeat.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Princes' Crusade armies depart
description: Major noble-led forces began the organized expedition eastward.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Crusaders besiege Nicaea
description: The first major objective of the main crusade armies was attacked.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Nicaea falls
description: The crusaders secured an important victory with Byzantine cooperation.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Battle of Dorylaeum
description: The crusaders defeated a Seljuk attack in Anatolia.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Siege of Antioch begins
description: The crusaders entered one of the most difficult phases of the campaign.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Crusaders take Antioch
description: The city fell after a long siege and internal betrayal.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Kerbogha's relief army defeated
description: The crusaders held Antioch against a major counterattack.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: County of Edessa established
description: The first crusader state was founded.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Crusaders march south toward Jerusalem
description: The final phase of the expedition began.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Siege of Jerusalem begins
description: The crusaders laid siege to the holy city.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Jerusalem captured
description: The crusaders stormed the city in a defining moment of the campaign.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Massacre follows capture of Jerusalem
description: The city's fall was marked by large-scale killing.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Godfrey of Bouillon assumes rule in Jerusalem
description: A new Latin Christian political order emerged.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Battle of Ascalon
description: The crusaders defeated a Fatimid army soon after taking Jerusalem.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and religious milestones in the First Crusade.
title: Kingdom of Jerusalem takes firmer shape
description: The crusade's gains evolved into lasting crusader states in the Levant.
